required_skills: 3D modeling and sculpting for game-ready assets including high-poly sculpting and optimized low-poly mesh creation
UV unwrapping and UV layout optimization for efficient texture space utilization across game assets
PBR texture authoring including albedo, normal, roughness, metallic, and AO map creation in Substance Painter
High-to-low poly baking workflows including normal map, curvature, and ambient occlusion baking for real-time asset production
Proficiency in Autodesk Maya or Blender for modeling, rigging support, and scene management
Asset optimization for real-time engines including polygon reduction, LOD creation, and texture atlasing
Game engine asset integration including import workflows, material setup, and in-engine visual validation in Unreal or Unity
Understanding of real-time rendering constraints including draw calls, texture memory budgets, and triangle count targets
preferred_skills: Organic character sculpting and high-frequency detail work in ZBrush for human, creature, and hero prop assets
Procedural material and texture creation in Substance Designer for modular, reusable material libraries
Hair and fur grooming using XGen (Maya), Ornatrix, or Unreal Groom for realistic character hair production
Photogrammetry asset creation and cleanup using RealityCapture or Metashape for photorealistic surface capture
Hard surface modeling for vehicles, weapons, and mechanical props using precision modeling techniques in Maya or Blender
Animation-friendly mesh topology for deforming character assets including proper edge flow for facial and body rigs
Portfolio demonstrating shipped game assets or high-quality personal projects at AAA visual standards
responsibilities: Create high-quality game-ready 3D assets spanning characters, props, weapons, and environmental objects from concept art or reference through to engine-integrated delivery
Sculpt high-poly source meshes in ZBrush with meticulous surface detail, then retopologize to production-compliant low-poly meshes with clean, animator-friendly edge flow
Produce PBR texture sets in Substance Painter for all assigned assets, delivering albedo, normal, roughness, metallic, and emissive maps at agreed resolution standards
Execute high-to-low poly baking workflows in Marmoset Toolbag, generating clean normal, AO, and curvature maps free of baking errors for all hard surface and organic assets
Optimize 3D assets to meet project-specific polygon budgets, draw call limits, and texture memory targets without compromising visual quality at target camera distances
Integrate assets into Unreal Engine or Unity, setting up materials, validating in-engine appearance under real-time lighting, and resolving any visual discrepancies from reference
Collaborate with art directors, concept artists, and technical artists to ensure assets align with established visual style guides and technical art standards
Generate LOD chains for all assets using automated tools and manual adjustment to ensure smooth level-of-detail transitions across required viewing distances
Participate in art reviews and critique sessions, incorporating feedback from leads and art directors to elevate asset quality to final shipping standards
Maintain clean file organization, asset naming conventions, and version control hygiene in Perforce or Git to support smooth team collaboration and pipeline stability
